name: Price of Fairness in Bandits: A Tight Minimax Characterization
summary: arXiv:2607.13402v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In bandit problems, standard regret-minimizing algorithms treat exploration as an amortized cost, which can expose early participants to unfair ex-...
description: arXiv:2607.13402v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In bandit problems, standard regret-minimizing algorithms treat exploration as an amortized cost, which can expose early participants to unfair ex-ante losses in settings such as clinical trials. Recent work addresses this by evaluating the sequence of per-round expected rewards through the generalized $p$-mean, interpolating between utilitarian...
author: Dhruv Sarkar, Soumyadeep Dutta, Sayak Ray Chowdhury
